name: NORDSON CORP.
summary: Nordson Corporation engineers, manufactures, and markets differentiated products and systems used to dispense, apply, and control adhesives, coatings, polymers, sealants, biomaterials, and other fluids. The company serves a wide variety of end markets including packaging, nonwovens, electronics, medical, appliances, energy, transportation, construction, and general product assembly. Nordson is headquartered in Westlake, Ohio.
